zh.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter是Bengt Bosson和Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson的女兒，於大約1240年出生在瑞典。她於大約1259年與Filip Filipsson在瑞典結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1293年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter是Bengt Bosson和Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson的女儿，于大约1240年出生在瑞典。她于大约1259年与Filip Filipsson在瑞典结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1293年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ingeborg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + borg ‘fortification’.

historicEvents.description: King Eriksson died. Valdemar crowned King. Birger Jarl declared regent until Valdemar is of age.

historicEvents.title: Earliest Mention of Stockholm
historicEvents.description: The earliest known recorded history of the city of Stockholm is in Norse sagas as Agnafit which dates to 1252. The city rose to prominence due to Baltic trade. Stockholm is now the most populous urban area in the region.

en.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter was born about 1240, in Sweden as the daughter of Bengt Bosson and Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson. She married Filip Filipsson about 1259, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1293, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter est née environ 1240, à Suède, fille de Bengt Bosson et Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson. Elle a épousé Filip Filipsson environ 1259, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1293, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter wurde um 1240 in Schweden, als Tochter von Bengt Bosson und Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson geboren. Sie hat um 1259 in Schweden Filip Filipsson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1293 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter è nata il circa 1240 nel Svezia come figlia di Bengt Bosson e Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson. Lei sposato Filip Filipsson circa 1259, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1293, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotterは約1240年にスウェーデンでBengt BossonとMrs. Ragnhild Bossonの娘として生まれた。約1259年にスウェーデンでFilip Filipssonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1293年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter(은)는 대략 1240년 스웨덴에서 Bengt Bosson(와)과 Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1259년 스웨덴에서 Filip Filipsson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1293년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1240–about 1293: tany ho any amin'ny 1240–tany ho any amin'ny 1293

pt.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Suécia filha de Bengt Bosson e Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson. Ela casou-se com Filip Filipsson aproximadamente 1259, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1293, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter родилась около 1240 г. в местности Швеция. Её родителей звали Bengt Bosson и Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Filip Filipsson около 1259 г. в местности Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1293 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

sm.about 1240–about 1293: e tusa o le 1240–e tusa o le 1293

es.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Karlsdotter nació aproximadamente 1240, en Suecia como hija de Bengt Bosson y Mrs. Ragnhild Bosson. Se casó con Filip Filipsson aproximadamente 1259, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1293, a la edad de 55 años.
